titles.title: A resolution supporting the designation of May 3 through May 9, 2026, as "Children's Mental Health Awareness Week".
A resolution supporting the designation of May 3 through May 9, 2026, as "Children's Mental Health Awareness Week".

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
